summary: Create the codebase foundation required to implement the local MVP without introducing deployment-first or multi-service complexity.

steps.name: scaffold-next-app
steps.summary: Scaffolded a Next.js 15 App Router app with Tailwind, repo-aligned lint/build/test scripts, and a warm local-MVP landing page shell.

steps.name: setup-tooling-and-env
steps.summary: Added Zod env validation, .env.example, Vitest with jsdom, and meaningful smoke tests for env parsing and shared UI.

steps.name: build-shared-app-shell
steps.summary: Created reusable shell components, route-group placeholder pages, and a shared warm-neutral UI foundation for auth, onboarding, ops, and teacher areas.
